M-022.NAME: device-provisioning-api
M-022.owns: user-facing device management, stealth-aware config retrieval and device-bound provisioning APIs

exports.fn-create-device: Creates a device and provisions a distinct peer or rejects on plan limit
exports.fn-rotate-device-config: Reissues peer material for one logical device while invalidating the old config
exports.fn-revoke-device: Revokes a specific device and frees or preserves a slot according to policy
exports.fn-download-stealth-config: Returns AmneziaWG config and QR payload with CLIENT_PROFILE and preshared-key parity
exports.fn-pending-trial-first-config: Allows verified users with pending trial access to create/reuse primary device and retrieve first config before the countdown starts
exports.fn-get-device-config: Read-only retrieval of an existing active device config without create, rotate, or reprovision side effects
exports.fn-download-device-config: Read-only per-device .conf attachment download using the existing MIME hardening helper
exports.fn-render-device-config-qr: Read-only per-device QR and optional Amnezia QR rendering with payload parity and secret-safe logs

phase-45-scope.primary-behaviors: pending trial access counts as config-eligible for first VPN config retrieval without changing paid plan/device semantics.
phase-45-scope.evidence: 2026-06-01: Phase-45 backend suite passed and includes vpn_router_compat plus pending trial access coverage.

phase-70-scope.primary-behaviors: Device-facing config routes keep current shape; QR/download/config parity tests cover active config payload without changing device registration, limits, or provisioning semantics.
phase-70-scope.evidence: 2026-06-04: Phase-70 router tests passed 13/13 and protected deploy/create-client.sh surface remained unchanged.

phase-71-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Add authenticated GET /api/v1/devices/{device_id}/config, /download, /qr, and optional /qr/amnezia endpoints that read only the caller-owned active device client and never rotate config material.
phase-71-executed-scope.verification: Backend tests assert ownership rejection, revoked/blocked rejection, active config parity, stable config_version on GET, .conf MIME headers, and redacted QR/download evidence.

M-022.phase-71-evidence: Backend device/vpn/trial suite passed 31/31; selected-device config, download, QR, and Amnezia QR endpoints are read-only, active-device-only, ownership-gated, and no-rotation.

phase-73-executed-scope.primary-behaviors: Selected-device AmneziaWG QR and .conf download remain read-only and active-device-bound; AmneziaVPN is routed to .conf import in the UI without backend endpoint or config_version changes.
phase-73-executed-scope.verification: Phase-73 smoke passed for selected-device AmneziaWG QR safety, no config rotation, AmneziaVPN .conf guidance, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.

M-022.phase-73-evidence: No backend device API shape changed; Phase-71 regression smoke and Phase-73 smoke passed locally.
M-022.hotspot: H-017: QR/raw config endpoints must not diverge in profile or preshared-key content
